title: 3D Market Gardener
description:
Replaces Mace with Market Gardener from TF2.
Sounds included.
body:
Comes with

  • The Funny Shovel itself (replaces the Mace)
  • Localization files (replaces name for the Mace with The Market Gardener and Critical Hit subtitles)
  • Critical hit sounds (critical hits for smash_air and smash_ground, critical received for smash_heavy)
original concept/model and sounds made by Valve
